Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth MacDonald, 415.922.5939, for plaintiff Dodeka, LLC.
Jeremiah Turner, 415.967.8553, defendant in pro per.

RULING: matter discussed. Hearing on claim of exemption is off calendar- calendared in error in this case; ruling after hearing on claim of exemption is reflected in the clerk's minutes for CGC-08-483453. See case # CGC-08-483453. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JEREMIAH TURNER, TEL. NO. 967-8553, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to December 11, 2012 for the Judgment Debtor to provide documentary evidence (such as a bank statement for the account at issue) tracing the amount levied upon to paid earnings and it is exempt in the amount provided for in CCP 704.070. Mr. Turner to fax these documents to the court by today and sending a copy to the Plaintiff's counsel. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF DODEKA, LLC'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is transferred to Department 302 (Law and Motion Department) to he heard at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
